target: Speaking P2 Features - Fluency Insights, Personalized Drills, Model Answer Compare

summary.overall_result: All Speaking P2 backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components have correct data-testid attributes and implementation. All 16 existing Phase 2 tests pass, plus 13 new Speaking P2 tests pass.

features_tested.details: Accepts criteria, weaknesses, transcript. Returns drill objects with title, steps, personalized_tip. Targets weak criteria (< band 6). DRILL_TEMPLATES for fluency, lexical, grammar, pronunciation all work.
Accepts question, part, book_id, test_id. Returns band7 + band8 answers with key_features and differences. Works for Parts 1, 2, 3.

features_tested.feature: Backend: Model answer caching in MongoDB
features_tested.details: First call returns cached=false, second call for same question returns cached=true. Cache key uses book_id, test_id, part, and question hash.
All Phase 2 tests (reason codes, evidence text, reason summary, retry functionality) continue to pass.
Line 1302: Card with data-testid='fluency-insights-card' renders when speakingEvaluations exist

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Fluency metrics (filler count, rate, words, corrections)
features_tested.details: Lines 1316-1333: metric-filler-count, metric-filler-rate, metric-word-count, metric-self-corrections all present with correct styling
Line 1364: Shows 'not available' message when fluencyInsights?.available is false
Lines 1371-1430: Card with 'Get Drills' button (data-testid='generate-drills-btn') that loads drills via fetchDrills function
Line 1399: Each drill has data-testid='drill-{criterion}' with title, steps, personalized_tip displayed
Line 1433: Card with 'Show Model Answers' button per speaking response (data-testid='get-model-{idx}')
Lines 1473, 1490: Band 7 and Band 8 model answers rendered with key_features and differences

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Phase 2 features (reason codes, evidence, retry)
features_tested.details: All data-testids from iteration_19 present: reason-summary-card, retry-by-filter-card, reason-badge-*, evidence-reading-*, retry-wrong-only-btn

critical_code_review_comments: Speaking P2 cards only render when speakingEvaluations object has data (requires completing speaking test with audio). Frontend logic verified via code review.
Fluency analysis is client-side (uses FILLER_WORDS array in useEffect hook) - works only when transcript is available

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code verification - all features implemented with correct data-testid attributes)

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing ielts17/test1 test data for model answer caching tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Speaking P2 features are fully implemented. Backend endpoints work correctly: generate-drills returns personalized drills with templates + LLM tips, model-answers returns Band 7/8 answers with MongoDB caching. Frontend has all required data-testid attributes. To UI test the Speaking P2 cards, complete a speaking test with audio recording - the results page requires speakingEvaluations in location.state. Fluency insights compute client-side from transcript.
